creator: raimeetravel
caption: I finally got my dream job & this is what it’s like! If you have questions about how I got here, please let me know!!! It’s been a loooong journey to get to this level but I’m always happy to share my advice (no course or product selling you on it, just happy to answer Qs!!) . #dreamjob #traveljob #travelindustry

transcription.text: This is a day in my life working my absolute dream job. I've wanted this job for so long and I think it's going to be fun to show the behind the scenes, especially because today and for this project that I'm working on, I'm in Kyoto, Japan. I've been working toward getting a job like this since 2014 when I first realized I really wanted to work in the travel industry and not every day looks like this. There are many days where I'm spending hours behind a computer or a phone screen, but the fact that I get to go to places like Japan for my job still does not sound real sometimes. So my job here is to showcase all of the off-the-beaten-path things around Kyoto. I'm working with Kyoto Tourism to hopefully get people off the beaten path when they visit this city. There's so much over-tourism happening around Japan right now, especially in Kyoto. And now we're off to lunch. For this trip, I'm only here for about 72 hours. Each trip like this is typically three to five days and these jobs are all paid. I make more doing this than I made in my corporate marketing job. I am tired all the time though. Last year, I took a total of 62 flights and flew the equivalent of seven times around the world. So like any job, there are pros and cons. I'm also sick right now because I always get sick because I'm always on planes and traveling. But even still, I wouldn't trade this for anything. I get to do so many unique things, meet amazing people, and explore places that I might not have known about and I get to show them to you. This hotel room was so amazing. And that was my day one in Kyoto. And now I'm so jet-lagged. I'm just gonna go to sleep early and do it again tomorrow.
